Welsh Statutory Instruments 2025 No. 1368 (W. 225) (C. 80) Building And Buildings, Wales The Building Safety Act 2022 (Commencement No. 6) (Wales) Regulations 2025 Made 12 December 2025 The Welsh Ministers make these Regulations in exercise of the powers conferred on them by section 170(4)(b)(i), (4)(b)(iii), (4)(b)(vi) and (4)(b)(viii) of the Building Safety Act 2022( 1 ). Title 1. The title of these Regulations is the Building Safety Act 2022 (Commencement No. 6) (Wales) Regulations 2025. Provisions coming into force on 1 July 2026 2. The following provisions of the Building Safety Act 2022 come into force, in relation to Wales, on 1 July 2026— (a) Section 32(2) (amendment of section 91 of the Building Act 1984( 2 ));  (b) section 36 (lapse of building control approval etc), for all remaining purposes;  (c) section 37 (determination of certain applications by Secretary of State or Welsh Ministers), for all remaining purposes;  (d) section 38 (compliance and stop notices), for all remaining purposes;  (e) section 39 (breach of building regulations), for all remaining purposes;  (f) section 45 (default powers of appropriate national authority);  (g) section 49(3) (amendment of paragraph 2 of Schedule 4 of the Building Act 1984);  (h) paragraph 14(8) of Schedule 5;  (i) paragraph 15(10) of Schedule 5;  (j) paragraph 20 of Schedule 5;  (k) paragraph 21(3), (4) and (5) of Schedule 5;  (l) paragraph 22(3), (4), (5) and (6) of Schedule 5;  (m) paragraph 23(3) and (4) of Schedule 5;  (n) paragraph 24(3) of Schedule 5;  (o) paragraph 26(3) and (4) of Schedule 5;  (p) paragraph 27(3), (4) and (5) of Schedule 5;  (q) paragraphs 28, 29, 31 and 32 of Schedule 5;  (r) paragraph 40(2) of Schedule 5;  (s) paragraph 41(3) of Schedule 5;  (t) paragraph 42(2) of Schedule 5;  (u) paragraphs 43 and 45 of Schedule 5;  (v) paragraph 46(3) of Schedule 5;  (w) paragraph 55(3) of Schedule 5;  (x) paragraphs 79 and 90 of Schedule 5.  Rebecca Evans Cabinet Secretary for Economy, Energy and Planning, one of the Welsh Ministers 12 December 2025 EXPLANATORY NOTE (This note is not part of the Regulations) These Regulations are the sixth commencement regulations made under the Building Safety Act 2022 (“ the 2022 Act ”). Regulation 2 brings into force certain provisions of Part 3 (amendments to the Building Act 1984) of, and Schedule 5 to, the 2022 Act on 1 July 2026 in relation to Wales. NOTE AS TO EARLIER COMMENCEMENT REGULATIONS (This note is not part of the Regulations) The following provisions of the 2022 Act have been brought into force in relation to Wales by commencement regulations made before the date of these Regulations. Provision Date of Commencement S.I.
